title: Campus Active Directory - Overview
body: Overview The Campus Active Directory Service provides a centralized Active Directory instance for the University of Wisconsin - Madison campus. The Campus Active Directory Service will allow participating departments to take advantage of centralized NetID-based authentication while allowing for delegated administration of local resources. This allows departmental IT administrators to assign group policies, manage security groups, and deploy software while taking advantage of the convenience of NetID authentication. Organizations that are interested in participating in the Campus Active Directory Service may request service by completing a request here: Campus Active Directory Request Form . Additional Information Additional information about Campus Active Directory can be found here: https://it.wisc.edu/services/active-directory-services/ . The Campus AD Community channel in Microsoft Teams is a place for Active Directory admins to discuss and share best practices. If you would like to join the Teams channel please contact activedirectory@doit.wisc.edu . Important updates to the Campus Active Directory service are shared through the campus_active_directory_community@g-groups.wisc.edu group. These updates will include out-of-band patches, workflow changes to requesting CADS services, etc. If you would like to be a member of this email list please also contact activedirectory@doit.wisc.edu . Where to Get Help If you have any questions or issues, please e-mail activedirectory@doit.wisc.edu .
